SELECT ?s, bif:st_ymax(?o) as ?ymax FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o . FILTER(bif:st_ymax(?o) > 0) };
SELECT ?s, bif:st_ymax(?o) as ?ymax FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o . FILTER(bif:st_ymax(?o) < 3) };
SELECT ?s, bif:st_ymax(?o) as ?ymax FROM { SELECT ?s ?o FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o } } AS inner WHERE { FILTER(bif:st_ymax(?o) > 4) };
SELECT ?s, bif:st_ymax(?o) as ?ymax FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o . ?s <shape> ?o . } GROUP BY ?s HAVING (MAX(bif:st_ymax(?o)) < 6) ;

SELECT ?s, bif:st_ymax(?o) as ?ymax FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { { SELECT ?s AS ?innerS, bif:st_ymax(?o) AS ?innerYmax FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o } GROUP BY ?s HAVING (COUNT(?o) > 1) } UNION { SELECT ?s AS ?innerS, bif:st_ymax(?o) AS ?innerYmax FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o . FILTER(bif:st_ymax(?o) < 5) } GROUP BY ?s } } ;
